compressed_regions.summary: Multiple backward bulk-related features exhibit extremely low cardinality with unique values equal to 1 and very low cardinality ratios, indicating near-constant values across the partition.

locality.scope_value: Bwd Avg Bulk Rate|Bwd Avg Bytes/Bulk|Bwd Avg Packets/Bulk
notes: cluster of backward bulk features with minimal variability

compressed_regions.summary: Backward TCP flag features (PSH, URG) and CWE Flag Count show near-constant values with unique values of 1 and very low cardinality ratios, indicating minimal variation.

compressed_regions.summary: Forward bulk rate and packet/bulk features, along with forward URG Flags, show near-constant values with unique values of 1 and very low cardinality ratios.

locality.scope_value: Fwd Avg Bulk Rate|Fwd Avg Bytes/Bulk|Fwd Avg Packets/Bulk|Fwd URG Flags

compressed_regions.summary: Multiple feature pairs exhibit perfect or near-perfect correlation (correlation=1 or ~0.9993), indicating strong redundancy and deterministic relationships.

locality.scope_value: Bwd Packet Length Mean|Avg Bwd Segment Size|Fwd Header Length|Fwd Header Length.1|Fwd PSH Flags|SYN Flag Count|Fwd Packet Length Mean|Avg Fwd Segment Size|RST Flag Count|ECE Flag Count|Total Backward Packets|Subflow Bwd Packets|Total Fwd Packets|Subflow Fwd Packets|Total Length of Bwd Packets|Subflow Bwd Bytes|Total Length of Fwd Packets|Subflow Fwd Bytes|Packet Length Mean|Average Packet Size
notes: multiple pairs with correlation=1 or near 1 indicating redundancy

compressed_regions.summary: Backward packet length features (Max, Mean, Std) and Avg Bwd Segment Size show significant class-conditioned structural variation with high variance ratios and large differences in unique values between BENIGN and DDoS classes.

locality.scope_value: Bwd Packet Length Max|Bwd Packet Length Mean|Bwd Packet Length Std|Avg Bwd Segment Size
notes: backward packet length related features with class-conditioned variation

compressed_regions.summary: Average Packet Size shows class-conditioned structural variation with moderate variance ratio and skewed unique values between BENIGN and DDoS classes.

notes: average packet size feature with class-conditioned variation

compressed_regions.summary: Destination Port feature shows strong distributional differences between BENIGN and DDoS classes, with DDoS having a dominant ratio of 1.0 and zero entropy, while BENIGN has lower dominant ratio and higher entropy, resulting in high JS divergence.

notes: feature sensitive to class-conditioned distributional shifts

compressed_regions.summary: Partition overview reports 729 duplicated rows and a class imbalance ratio of 1.577, indicating moderate class skew and presence of duplicate data points.
